text: To flush an eye that has been exposed to a chemical, hold the affected eye:

options.text: A) Higher than the unaffected eye
B) Lower than the unaffected eye
C) At the same level as the unaffected eye

explanation: When flushing a chemical from the eye, holding the affected eye lower than the unaffected one allows the contaminated water to drain away from the unaffected eye. This prevents cross-contamination and ensures thorough irrigation of the exposed eye.
